## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the implemented change.

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build .\SnapAnchor.csproj -c Release -p:Platform=x64`
- [ ] Recognition smoke suite passes
- [ ] Tested relevant DPI/multi-monitor behaviour
- [ ] No generated builds, backups, user data, secrets, or signing files are included
- [ ] Third-party notices remain accurate

## Screenshots

Use only redacted, non-sensitive sample content. Add before/after images when the change affects UI.
